summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finance Tracker application. All major features tested including analytics charts, export functionality, and cron endpoints.

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings in console - width/height dimensions showing as -1
design_issues.details: Charts are functional but show console warnings about dimensions. This is likely a timing issue with chart container sizing.

passed_tests: Frontend login functionality with test credentials
Chart type toggles (Area, Bar, Pie charts)
Summary stats display (Avg Monthly Income, Maaser, Given)
Export Data section visibility in sidebar
CSV export button functionality with file download
PDF export button functionality with file download
